revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from more specific name |name=From a more specific name |from=a title that is a more specific name to a less specific, more general one |info=** It may be a more specialized term, include extraneous identifiers, or simply be worded more narrowly. It leads to the title in accordance with the naming conventions for [[WP:common name|common name]]s and can help writing and searches. It is not necessary to replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]]. |all category=Redirects from more specific names }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from more specific name |name=From a more specific name |from=a title that is a more specific name to a less specific, more general one |info=** It may be a more specialized term, include extraneous identifiers, or simply be worded more narrowly. It leads to the title in accordance with the naming conventions for [[WP:common name|common name]]s and can help writing and searches. It is not necessary to replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]]. |all category=Redirects from more specific names }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

It leads to the title in accordance with the naming conventions for [[WP:common name|common name]]s and can help writing and searches. It is not necessary to replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]]. |all category=Redirects from more specific names }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from more specific name |name=From a more specific name |from=a title that is a more specific name to a less specific, more general one |info=** It may be a more specialized term, include extraneous identifiers, or simply be worded more narrowly. It leads to the title in accordance with the naming conventions for [[WP:common name|common name]]s and can help writing and searches. It is not necessary to replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]]. |all category=Redirects from more specific names }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from more specific name |name=From a more specific name |from=a title that is a more specific name to a less specific, more general one |info=** It may be a more specialized term, include extraneous identifiers, or simply be worded more narrowly. It leads to the title in accordance with the naming conventions for [[WP:common name|common name]]s and can help writing and searches. It is not necessary to replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]]. |all category=Redirects from more specific names }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
